expectations.evidence: Uses 'cat >> ~/scripts/ecosystem.env' and notes 'Written to ~/scripts/ecosystem.env (central config), not ~/.zshrc directly'
Sets both variables with correct names
Uses test-user-key and test-app-token as provided

expectations.text: Advises reloading the shell (source ~/.zshrc) after changes
Does not expose credentials in any insecure way
expectations.evidence: Notes 'The env file is git-ignored for security'
